title: drynaria phymatodes
intro: Drynaria phymatodes, also known as Polypodium phymatodes or Chinese polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Drynaria phymatodes include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and improving cardiovascular health. Drynaria phymatodes is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule for its medicinal use, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
